notes: Local file-backed judgment over the frozen judge packet, Solo trace, Holo selected artifacts, and benchmark results. This is not a substitute for external independent judge outputs.

controlling_source_chain: ALERT-OVX-HOLD-021 and DISP-OVX-021 close the thermal-transport hold boundary for OVX-9 lot L-882.
INV-OVX-021 names INV-OVX-2026-7021 as the inventory release to sellable inventory.
MOVE-OVX-021 stages lot L-882 for the sellable inventory bin.
INV-OVX-021 binds INV-OVX-2026-7021 to thermal-transport.
DISP-OVX-021 row QD-74 binds the same product/lot to packaging-inspection.
STD-OVX-021-P requires exact hold-class match before movement.
ACT-ACR-022 activates DG-41B production telemetry at Site 18-P.
CAL-ACR-022 covers DG-41B production telemetry at Site 18-P for RC-7 before activation.
RC-ACR-022 requires calibration attachment before activation and SITE-ACR-022 confirms the production telemetry site.
ACT-ACR-022 is for Site 18-P production telemetry.
CAL-ACR-022 is for Site 18-L lab telemetry.
STD-ACR-022-P rejects shared naming prefixes when site and use class do not exactly match.
EHS-NOV-042 names PO-NOV-042 before issuance.
EHS-NOV-042 covers NS-55, Facility R2, and the 0-25 liter band; PO-NOV-042 is 18 liters.
SRC-NOV-042 is sourcing-only and does not override the execution release.
PO-NOV-042 binds 18 liters NS-55 to Facility R2.
SRC-NOV-042 is supplier quote collection only.
EHS-NOV-042 says purchase execution release remains to be scheduled.
SHIP-SOR-047 matches controlled analyzer part C-17, Canada, service depot role, and date 2026-06-23.
EXC-SOR-047 covers those exact four fields.
STD-SOR-047-P requires those four fields to match before export.
SHIP-SOR-047 says consignee role is service depot.
EXC-SOR-047 says consignee role is internal repair center.
STD-SOR-047-P requires exact consignee-role match.
AUTH-BOR-082 covers site B-18, protocol P8.1, current IRB-approved consent C12, and activation date 2026-06-28.
ACT-BOR-082 confirms site B-18 under protocol P8.1 and consent C12 on 2026-06-28.
FEAS-BOR-082 is planning-only and cannot override the current consent authority.
AUTH-BOR-082 covers site B-18, protocol P8.1, activation date 2026-06-28, and consent C12.
AUTH-BOR-082 also says current IRB-approved consent C12 remains pending.
STD-BOR-082-P requires consent-status class to be closed before enrollment.

overall_notes: Local judgment confirms the current benchmark analysis: Solo is not always wrong, but it is unreliable at the action boundary on this locked set. Solo passed 7/10 local KNEW labels and failed with WRONG, CONFUSED, and LUCKY on the remaining three. Full HoloVerify passed 10/10 local KNEW labels.
